'''''Tree of Tarintha''''' was the name of a floating [[Ithorian Herdship|herd city]] above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]].

{{City-stub}}

==History==
It was the largest herdship and contained an extensive computer library.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
